cards.immediateText: If the BOOST value of this card matches the BOOST value of your opponent's card ignore its defense value.
cards.title: chance of life or death

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, draw 2 cards. If you lost the combat, take 1 damage. If UNKNOWN, do both.
cards.title: Feral Strike

cards.basicText: Reveal a card from your hand. Your opponent must discard a card of equal BOOST value. If they do not have a card of equal value, choose a fighter to take damage equal to the BOOST value..
cards.title: Killed by curiosity

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, the opposing fighter discards a card. If you lost the combat, recover 2 health. If UNKNOWN, do both.
cards.title: A state of Flux

cards.basicText: Recover 1 health. Then discard the top card of your deck and recover additional health equal to that card's BOOST value.
cards.title: Both alive and dead

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter. If you lost the combat, place your fighter in any space in its zone. If UNKNOWN, do both.
cards.duringText: You may increase or decrease the value of this card by 1.
cards.title: Broken Reality

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Your opponent draws cards equal to the amount of damage they did this combat. If the combat resulted as UNKNOWN, The Cat recovers 1 health.
cards.title: Receiving Life or Death

cards.afterText: You may shuffle a card from your discard pile back into your deck for every point of damage you took this combat. If the combat resulted as UNKNOWN, deal 1 damage to all adjacent fighters.
cards.title: All is Unknown inside the Box

cards.basicText: Recover 1 health. RemoveSchrodinger's Cat from the board. At the start of your next turn, place Schrodinger's Cat in any space. (If you played this as your first action, end your turn.)
cards.title: Vanish

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, Draw 2 cards, then shuffle 2 cards from your hand back into your deck. If you lost the combat, gain an action. If the result is UNKNOWN, do both.
cards.title: Infinite Possibilities

cards.duringText: If the printed value of your opponent's card and your card is  UNKNOWN, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: A Cat's Paw

hero.name: Schrödinger's Cat
hero.specialAbility:
MORE THAN PHILISOPHICAL
Whenever a combat involving The Cat ends in a tie, it is considered UNKNOWN instead and neither fighter is considered the winner or loser.

sidekick.name: The Analytical Engine
sidekick.quote:
"When I hear of Schrödinger's cat, I reach for my pistol."
                                          -Stephen Hawking
